disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Has completely run out of daily oral HIV pre-exposure medication and is due to attend an event tonight involving planned condomless receptive anal intercourse
trigger_question_examples: What has happened with your medication?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm on PrEP to stop me getting HIV and I've run out — the pack's empty. I've got a big event tonight where I'll be having sex, including receptive anal sex without condoms, and I don't want to be unprotected.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Has been strictly adherent to daily pre-exposure medication until today's lapse; no prior missed doses
trigger_question_examples: How have you been taking the tablets up to now?
Have you missed doses before this?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've taken it every single day without missing, right up until today — this is the first time I've run out.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Denies any fever, muscle aches, sore throat, rash or swollen glands
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fever, aches, sore throat, rash or swollen glands recently?
Do you feel unwell in any way?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, nothing like that — no fever, no aches, no sore throat, no rash and no swollen glands. I feel completely well.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Reports a recent (about 4 weeks ago) negative HIV test and normal kidney blood tests done for the medication
trigger_question_examples: When were you last tested for HIV and had your kidney function checked?
Do you know your recent blood test results?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: About four weeks ago my HIV test came back negative and my kidney bloods were normal — that's when my regular prescriber last reviewed me.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Denies urinary burning, penile discharge or genital ulcers; reports a recent negative screen for other sexually transmitted infections
trigger_question_examples: Any burning when you pass urine, discharge, or sores?
Have you had a recent sexual health screen?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No burning, no discharge, no sores. I had a full STI screen recently and it was all clear.
